name: Please generate a python calculator with simple additions, subtraction, multiplication, and division, that runs on the terminal

display_menu.description: Display menu with options: Add, Subtract, Multiply, Divide, Exit

get_user_input.description: Get user input for operation choice

invalid_choice.description: Display 'Invalid choice' and return to menu

get_numbers.description: Prompt user to enter two numbers

perform_operation.description: Perform selected operation (addition, subtraction, multiplication, division)

check_division_by_zero.description: Check for division by zero if operation is division

display_error.description: Display 'Cannot divide by zero' and return to menu

display_result.description: Display the result of the operation
